tasks.description: Compute export dialog section availability dynamically from workspace data. Currently all SECTION_GROUPS have available:true hardcoded, making IMP-094 tooltip infrastructure unreachable. Accept availability flags as props, compute per-section availability. This also resolves BUG-043.
acceptance_criteria: ExportPdfDialogProps accepts an `availability` record mapping ExportConfig keys to booleans
SECTION_GROUPS `available` field is replaced with dynamic lookup from the availability prop

Sections disabled when data is missing: journeyMap/journeySentiment disabled when no journey tab exists, improvements disabled when no improvement ideas, aiInsights disabled when no AI analysis cached, perspectiveComparison disabled when no perspectives, toolLandscape disabled when no tools, prioritizationMatrix disabled when no prioritization scores on steps
canvasSnapshot, dataTable, gapAnalysis, costAnalysis, executiveSummary always available (core sections)
Disabled sections show tooltip text (from disabledTooltip) on hover
Disabled sections are unchecked and cannot be toggled
FlowCanvas receives and passes availability prop to ExportPdfDialog
canvas-view.tsx computes availability flags from workspace data (tabs, improvementIdeas, perspectives, tools, steps, workspace.settings)
Preset configs (Full Audit, Executive Summary, Gap Report) only enable sections that are available — unavailable sections in a preset stay false

patterns_to_follow: ExportPdfDialog is rendered inside flow-canvas.tsx (line 512), which receives props from canvas-view.tsx
canvas-view.tsx already fetches improvementIdeas, tools, steps, sections, and has access to tabs/perspectives via useWorkspace()
SectionDef interface at export-pdf-dialog.tsx:77 has { key, label, available, disabledTooltip? }
SECTION_GROUPS at lines 84-117 defines 4 groups with 12 sections total
FlowCanvasProps at flow-canvas.tsx:44 defines component props — add sectionAvailability prop here
Preset configs (EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_CONFIG, FULL_AUDIT_CONFIG, GAP_REPORT_CONFIG) should mask unavailable sections
learnings_relevant: Optional prop + page.tsx wiring gap: builders must update BOTH the view component AND the page/parent that passes props

tasks.special_instructions: Key implementation detail: ExportPdfDialog should accept a Record<keyof ExportConfig, boolean> prop for availability instead of computing it internally. flow-canvas.tsx passes it through. canvas-view.tsx computes it: hasJourneyTab = tabs.some(t => t.canvas_type === 'journey'), hasImprovements = check if improvementIdeas array has items, hasAiInsights = check workspace.settings?.last_analysis_at, hasPerspectives = perspectives.length > 0, hasTools = tools.length > 0, hasPrioritizationScores = steps.some(s => s.effort_score != null || s.impact_score != null). When a preset is applied, AND its config with availability to prevent enabling unavailable sections.

tasks.description: Fix PDF Table of Contents truncation when 12+ sections are enabled — add page overflow handling with pdf.addPage() and y reset.
acceptance_criteria: renderTableOfContents() in enhanced-pdf-sections.ts handles overflow by calling pdf.addPage() and resetting y when entries exceed page height
All 12 sections appear in TOC when all are enabled
Page number tracking continues correctly after TOC pagination

similar_files: src/lib/export/pdf.ts — uses newTablePage() pattern for page overflow
patterns_to_follow: Look at newTablePage() in pdf.ts for the existing page overflow pattern
renderTableOfContents is around line 1349 in enhanced-pdf-sections.ts

tasks.special_instructions: Small fix: replace the `break` on y overflow with pdf.addPage() + reset y to top margin. Increment pageNumber. Match existing page overflow patterns in the file.

tasks.description: Fix overlapping NEW GROUP tool section nodes on default canvas — ensure auto-positioned tool sections have non-overlapping coordinates with minimum gap.
acceptance_criteria: New tool section nodes created via Add Tool Section button are positioned with non-overlapping coordinates
Minimum 50px gap between auto-positioned tool section nodes
Existing tool section positions are not affected (only new creations)

patterns_to_follow: Check existing tool section positions before computing new position
Use viewport center + offset based on existing section count

tasks.special_instructions: Find the handleAddToolSection (or equivalent) function in tools-canvas-view.tsx. Currently likely uses a fixed position. Change to compute position based on existing tool sections count — offset each new one by (count * spacing) to avoid overlap.

warnings_added: Accessibility cadence due at iter 130 — deferred to 131 in favor of BUG-043 resolution via IMP-105
